focus.title: Focus
focus.emptyDescription: Right-click a task on the board and choose "Highlight for focus".

convertDialog.title: Import office files
convertDialog.description_one: {{count}} file can be converted to a Markdown doc. How should we handle it?
convertDialog.description_other: {{count}} files can be converted to Markdown docs. How should we handle them?

docs.selectWorkspaceDescription: Choose a workspace in the sidebar to view docs.
docs.selectDocDescription: Pick a doc from the list to open it.

meetings.selectWorkspaceDescription: Choose a workspace in the sidebar to view meetings.
meetings.noMeetingsDescription: Create one with + New Meeting in the panel.
meetings.selectMeetingDescription: Pick a meeting from the list to open it.

overview.notFoundDescription: This project may have been deleted or moved.

tree.deleteConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This will permanently remove the project and all its tasks, docs, and meetings.

projects.selectWorkspaceDescription: Choose a workspace in the sidebar to view projects.
projects.noProjectsDescription: Create one with + New Project in the panel.
projects.selectProjectDescription: Pick a project from the list to view its overview.

taskPicker.pressEnterAsNote: Press Enter to add as note

compactSidebar.label: Compact sidebar
compactSidebar.description: Show only icons in the sidebar (or drag the edge to resize)

connection.title: Connection
connection.connectHint: Defaults to https:// if you omit it. The address must use https.
connection.httpsRequired: Server must use https. An http address would send your sign-in token unencrypted.
connection.switchToLocalDescription: Switch back to local files. Your local data is untouched.

showWeekends.label: Show weekends
showWeekends.description: Include Saturday and Sunday in the week view

templates.title: Templates
templates.description: Define default content for new meetings, docs, and tasks. Set global defaults or customize per workspace.

meeting.label: Meeting
meeting.description: Pre-filled content for new meeting notes

doc.label: Doc
doc.note: The title heading (# Title) is added automatically.

provider.title: Provider
provider.description: Connect an AI provider. Powers the assistant, drafting, and catalog summaries.
provider.label: Provider

apiKey.label: API Key ({{provider}})
apiKey.storedNotice: Stored in the OS keychain (Keychain / Credential Manager / Secret Service).

browserMode.title: AI is unavailable in browser mode
browserMode.descriptionStart: API keys are only stored in the OS keychain, which Desk can't reach from
browserMode.descriptionEnd: (or the built app) to configure providers and use the assistant.

keychainError.title: Couldn't read the keychain
keychainError.description: Desk couldn't fetch the stored key. Saving a new one may still work, but existing keys can't be loaded until this clears.

errors.linuxKeyring: On Linux, this usually means GNOME Keyring or KWallet isn't running. Start your desktop secret service and try again.

privacy.title: Data & Privacy
privacy.description: What Desk sends to your AI provider, and when.
privacy.intro: AI features send content to the provider selected above (Anthropic or OpenAI) over their API. Desk has no AI server of its own, and nothing is sent until you configure an API key.
privacy.assistantBody: : your messages, the conversation history, and the contents of files the assistant reads to answer you.
privacy.smartIndexBody: : short previews and summaries of your files, sent when you rebuild the index or, if Auto-summarize on save is enabled, automatically after a save.
privacy.retention: Retention is governed by your provider's API terms. Anthropic and OpenAI state that API data is not used to train their models by default.

acknowledgement.title: Privacy acknowledgement
acknowledgement.given: You have acknowledged the AI privacy notice.
acknowledgement.notGiven: Shown once before your first AI request.

assistant.title: Assistant
assistant.description: How the in-app assistant chats, drafts, and retrieves context.
assistant.contextNotice: The assistant doesn't auto-inject context at the start of a turn. It decides when to query the catalog and read files. Manage the catalog itself under Settings → Catalog.

toolDetails.label: Show tool details in assistant responses
toolDetails.description: Display tool arguments, results, and retrieved file details inline.

agents.title: External Agents
agents.description: Generate Markdown files alongside your data so external CLI agents understand your work with no setup.
agents.notice: These settings apply to external CLI agents (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI) reading your data folder directly. For instructions to the in-app assistant, see Settings → Assistant.

emit.title: Emit Files
emit.description: Choose which agent files to write into your data folder. Identical content, three filenames.
emit.noneEnabled: No agent files are being emitted. Your instructions below are saved but won't be written to disk until at least one toggle is on.

global.title: Global Instructions
global.description: Inlined into the top-level agent files. Applies across all workspaces.

perWorkspace.title: Per-Workspace
perWorkspace.description: Workspace-specific instructions appended to that workspace's agent files.
perWorkspace.selectPrompt: Select a workspace to edit its instructions.

instructions.globalDescription: Inlined into the top-level CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md / GEMINI.md between desk:user-instructions markers on every regen.
instructions.workspaceDescription: Inlined into this workspace's CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md / GEMINI.md between desk:user-instructions markers on every regen.
instructions.globalPlaceholder: e.g., Always reply in German. Use Conventional Commit prefixes when writing files.
instructions.workspacePlaceholder: e.g., This workspace is for client X. Never reference internal projects in drafts.
instructions.charCount_one: {{count}} character · saves automatically · written on the next regen.
instructions.charCount_other: {{count}} characters · saves automatically · written on the next regen.

preview.errorBrowserMode: Preview is only available in the desktop app.
preview.errorFileMissing: File doesn't exist yet. Toggle CLAUDE.md on, then come back.

storage.title: Data Storage
storage.description: Where your projects and files are stored
storage.helperText: All your workspaces, projects, tasks, and notes are stored as markdown files in this folder.

reset.title: Reset
reset.description: Restore defaults and re-run setup. Your data files are kept.
reset.helperText: This will reset all settings and show the setup wizard again. Your data files will not be deleted.

resetDialog.title: Reset All Settings
resetDialog.description: Are you sure you want to reset all settings to defaults? This will show the setup wizard again. Your data files will not be deleted.

pathDialog.emptyDescription: No Desk data found at this path. You'll need to create your first workspace.

app.title: Desk
app.description: Project & task management in plain Markdown

updates.title: Updates
updates.description: Check for new versions of Desk

links.title: Links
links.description: Open project resources in your browser

license.title: License
license.description: Open source under the GNU General Public License

status.title: File Index Status
status.description: File index stats, errors, and build controls

info.oneCatalog: One index, two readers: the in-app assistant queries this file index directly. When any agent file is enabled (Settings → Agents) the same index is written as Markdown alongside it so external agents (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI) read it with no setup.
info.noProvider: No AI provider configured, so summaries use plain text previews. Add a key in Settings → AI for AI-generated summaries.

config.title: File Index Settings
config.description: When summaries refresh and how much of each file is sent for summarization.

autoSummarize.label: Auto-summarize on save
autoSummarize.description: Keep summaries fresh as you edit, and add new files to the index on first save.
autoSummarize.activeWarning: ~5 seconds after your last save, each file whose body actually changed is re-summarized (one API call per file). Metadata-only saves don't trigger a call.

detail.label: Summary detail level
detail.description: How much of each file is sent for summarization. Higher = better summaries, more tokens.

clearDialog.title: Clear Index
clearDialog.description: This empties the file index used by the in-app assistant and deletes the generated CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, GEMINI.md, and WORKSPACE_CONTEXT.md files. Rebuild to regenerate. This action cannot be undone.

customInstructions.title: Custom Instructions
customInstructions.description: Your additions to the AI's built-in default prompts. The defaults are always sent; your text is appended after them.

global.label: Applies to everything (chat + email)
global.placeholder: e.g., respond with concise bullet points.
global.helperText: For instructions to external CLI agents (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI) reading your data folder, see Settings → Agents.

customInstructions.viewBaseContext: View base context (included in all prompts)

chat.label: Assistant chat only
chat.description: General assistant interactions in the Assistant tab

newWorkspace.title: New Workspace
newWorkspace.description: Create a workspace to separate an area of your work, like a client, side project, or anything else
newWorkspace.namePlaceholder: e.g., Acme Corp, Side Projects, Studies

newProject.title: New Project
newProject.description: Create a new project in your workspace

newTask.title: New Task
newTask.description: Create a new task in your workspace

newDoc.title: New Doc
newDoc.description: Create a new document in your workspace

newMeeting.title: New Meeting
newMeeting.description: Create a new meeting in your workspace

editWorkspace.title: Edit Workspace
editWorkspace.namePlaceholder: e.g., Acme Corp, Side Projects, Studies
editWorkspace.homeNote: This is your home workspace. It holds the quick-capture inbox and can't be deleted, but you can rename and recolor it.
editWorkspace.deleteNote: Permanently delete this workspace and all its projects, tasks, docs, and meetings.
editWorkspace.deleteConfirmDescription: This will permanently delete "{{name}}" and all its projects, tasks, docs, and meetings. This action cannot be undone.

doc.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this doc? This action cannot be undone.

task.contentPlaceholder: Add notes, details, or checklist items...
task.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this task? This action cannot be undone.

meeting.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this meeting? This action cannot be undone.

shared.aiIncludedToggle: Included in AI context (click to exclude)
shared.aiExcludedToggle: Excluded from AI context (click to include)

noActive.title: No active tasks
noActive.description: Tasks from all workspaces will appear here

inWorkspace.title: No tasks in {{workspace}}
inWorkspace.description: Tasks assigned to this workspace will appear here

none.title: No docs yet
none.description: Create your first doc to get started

none.title: No meetings yet
none.description: Create your first meeting note to get started

settings.dataPathUpdatedCreateWorkspace: Data path updated. Create your first workspace.
settings.dataPathUpdatedWizard: Data path updated. Setup wizard will guide you.

secrets.keychainUnavailable: Couldn't access the OS keychain. AI features will be off until this is resolved. Open Settings → AI for details.

startup.title: Desk couldn't start
startup.description: Desk failed to set up its data folder. Your files are safe. This is a startup problem, not data loss.
startup.hint: Make sure the data folder exists and is readable, then retry.

connection.notAvailableRemote: Not available when connected to a server.

unexpected.title: Something went wrong
unexpected.description: An unexpected error occurred. You can try again or reload the page.

settings.catalogClearedPartial: Index cleared, but some agent files could not be removed: {{message}}

setup.checkDataFolder: Couldn't access "{{path}}". Check that the folder path is valid and that Desk can write there, then try again.
setup.createDataFolder: Setup couldn't create your data folder at "{{path}}". Make sure the location exists and Desk has permission to write there, then try again.

doc.cannotRevealBrowser: Cannot reveal files in browser mode
doc.cannotOpenBrowser: Cannot open files in browser mode
doc.crossScopeMove: Cross-scope moves aren't supported yet. Moves must stay inside the same workspace or project.

folder.crossKindMove: Moving folders between Docs and AI Docs isn't supported yet. Move docs individually.

email.draftStartFailed: Failed to start assistant draft. Check Settings → AI.

input.placeholder: Ask Assistant… (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline)

assistant.notConfigured: Assistant is not configured. Open Settings → AI and add a provider key.

empty.title: Start with Desk Assistant
empty.description: Ask for analysis, context lookup, or task/doc/meeting updates. Assistant will use tools when needed.

consent.title: Before you use AI features
consent.description: Desk's AI features send content to the provider you chose (Anthropic or OpenAI) over their API. Desk runs no AI server of its own.

whatItems.messages: Messages you type to the assistant, plus the conversation history.
whatItems.previews: Short previews and summaries of your files for the file index.
whatItems.fileContents: The contents of files the assistant reads to answer you.

consent.whenBody: Only when you use an AI feature. With Auto-summarize on save enabled, short file previews are also sent automatically after you edit a file.
consent.retentionBody: Handled under your provider's API terms. Anthropic and OpenAI state that API data is not used to train their models by default.
consent.footer: Nothing is sent if you have not configured an API key. You can review this anytime in Settings → AI.

dropOverlay.title: Drop email to open in Desk
dropOverlay.subtitle: Apple Mail · Outlook · Thunderbird

replyHelper.instructionsPlaceholder: e.g., be warm, concise, cite project status from docs...
replyHelper.configureProvider: Configure an AI provider in Settings to use Assistant drafting.

welcome.title: Welcome to Desk.
welcome.subtitle: Your projects, tasks, docs, and meetings, as plain Markdown files you own.

location.title: Where should Desk keep your work?
location.subtitle: You can change this anytime in Settings.
location.localDescription: Store your files locally on this computer.
location.remoteDescription: Connect to a deployed desk.md server (e.g. on your NAS) for access from your phone and other devices.

server.title: Connect to your server
server.subtitle: Enter the address of your desk.md server. You'll sign in on the next screen.
server.label: Server address
server.hint: Defaults to https:// if you omit it. The address must use https.
server.httpsRequired: Server must use https. An http address would send your sign-in token unencrypted.

dataFolder.title: Where should we store your files?
dataFolder.subtitle: Pick any folder. Desk creates the structure for you, and you can move it later.
dataFolder.label: Data folder

existingDetected.title: You already have Desk data here.
existingDetected.description_one: Found {{count}} workspace in this folder. Continue where you left off, or start fresh.
existingDetected.description_other: Found {{count}} workspaces in this folder. Continue where you left off, or start fresh.

workspace.title: Name your workspace.
workspace.subtitle: This is your home, for personal notes and the capture inbox. Add more workspaces later for clients, projects, or other areas.

create.title: Create your account
create.subtitle: Set up the account that secures this desk.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

account.title: Account
account.description: You are signed in to this hosted desk.
account.signOutDescription: End your session on this device.

tabContextMenu.unsavedTabDescription: "{{title}}" has unsaved changes. Do you want to save before closing?

updates.description: A new version of Desk is ready to install.

unsavedChanges.title: Unsaved Changes
unsavedChanges.description: You have unsaved changes in: {{tabs}}{{more}}. Do you want to save before quitting?

saveChanges.title: Unsaved Changes
saveChanges.description: Do you want to save the changes you made?

fileMoved.title: File Moved
fileMoved.description: This file has been moved or renamed externally.

fileDeleted.title: File Deleted
fileDeleted.description: This file has been deleted from the file system.
fileDeleted.unsavedHint: You have unsaved edits. Restore them to re-create the file.
